extraction.one_line_summary: PETERS Nans won from the 13-rider early break after KOZNERFALL secured KOM points and POWLESS placed fifth from the same move.
tactical_patterns: POWLESS took polka dot wearer COSNEFROY into 13-rider break mile 2, gambling on breakaway success over GC defense.
BENNETT sprinted intermediate against SAGAN despite mountain stage, protecting green jersey by two points in opportunistic micro-battle.
BARDET attacked final climb after earlier crash, needing exactly 13 seconds for GC jump, showing crash recovery tactics work.
AG2R paced BARDET back after crash using VUILLERMOZ, preserving GC position before late attack rather than abandoning stage ambitions.

rider_signals.PETERS Nans: positive: unknown rider delivered stage win from massive early break, emerged as clutch finisher
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: fifth place from break despite being best-placed GC rider in move, aggressive time recovery after previous losses
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: crashed mid-stage then attacked final climb to gain exactly needed 13 seconds, moved to 4th overall
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: contested intermediate sprint on mountain stage solely to protect green jersey, micro-managing two-point gap
rider_signals.COSNEFROY Benoît: neutral: polka dot jersey holder joined break but lost KOM competition ground despite tactical placement
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: abandoned race during breakaway, could not continue despite being in favorable position
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: defended yellow jersey but required chase effort when BARDET attacked, showing defensive vulnerability
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: recovered time lost to mechanical previous day, moved back into top ten GC
